title: Harden automated planning trust and recovery boundaries
description: Fix final-review blockers in planning.ts: record/propagate safe base_branch; never turn model-authored acceptance text into executable closeout shell; bind apply recovery IDs to the requested target, parent epic, expected titles/roles and marker; make creates recoverably idempotent across crash windows; reject symlinked planning ancestors. Add adversarial tests.
acceptance_criteria: New planned epics can reach review with safe base_branch; model output cannot inject closeout commands; corrupted/cross-epic apply state fails closed; simulated create/write crash retries without duplicates; symlink ancestors are rejected; tests pass.
